mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drug_batch ( drug_id, batch_no, expiry_date, expiry_warning_days, current_stock, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{drugId}, #{batchNo}, #{expiryDate}, #{expiryWarningDays}, #{currentStock}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT db.batch_id, db.batch_no AS batchNo, db.drug_id AS drugId, d.drug_name AS drugName, db.current_stock AS currentStock, db.expiry_date AS expiryDate, db.expiry_warning_days AS expiryWarningDays FROM drug_batch db LEFT JOIN drug d ON db.drug_id = d.drug_id
AND ( db.batch_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.drug_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY db.create_time DESC
